selection_basis.ledger_reason: This was the next strong active sibling after the campaign/graveyard doctrine reduction.
selection_basis.bounded_goal: Reduce the active A1 normalization and rosetta layer into a smaller controller-usable fence set without rereading raw A1 normalization sources or promoting normalization doctrine into lower-loop law.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Strongest next active source-like sibling once the remaining a1_state normalization layer is narrowed.
Strongest work-surface follow-on if the queue returns to export archaeology next.
Strongest later work-surface packet once the active-system closure lane begins.

raw_source_reread_reason: Parent artifacts already isolate the generic family model, integration authority rules, family-local rosetta restatements, live family split, and tool-drift fences needed for this bounded reduction.

notes: This batch preserves active A1 normalization and rosetta doctrine as a proposal-only controller fence set rather than lower-loop truth.
